name: hush
description: Token-lean sessions at the harness level, not the prompt level. Ships a forced output style that rewires the system prompt itself — no preamble, no play-by-play, one outcome-first final message — plus a PostToolUse hook that mechanically shrinks Bash/PowerShell output before it enters context (ANSI/progress-bar strip, duplicate collapse, line caps; failures keep ~4x more, verbatim), and a Stop hook that measures mid-turn narration and injects one corrective line only when the budget is exceeded. Replaces prompt-injection style plugins like caveman: same terseness goal, stronger mechanism, and it also cuts the input-token side they never touch. Tune via HUSH_CAP_PASS, HUSH_CAP_FAIL, HUSH_NARRATION_BUDGET; disable with HUSH_DISABLE=1.
